title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Baniapur
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Baniapur assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Baniapur draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Baniapur promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Flood protection works in Baniapur inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Baniapur.

title: High stakes battle in Baniapur as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Baniapur. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Baniapur assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Baniapur show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.
